events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the compliance assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Verdict: **fail** — a twisted brake hose is a reject-condition defect (asymmetric load on the reinforcement braid, kink risk through suspension travel), not something that can be waved through at rough-in. Required corrective actions include removing and reinstalling the hose per OEM routing marks, torquing fittings to spec, cycling suspension to confirm no twist/kink, then bleeding and pressure-testing before it can proceed to inspection/sign-off.
